subject: Business-name trademark clearance across the 5 brand candidates

pass_if: USPTO TESS + common-law search completed for all 5 candidates with hit/no-hit table
Each candidate classed in relevant Nice classes (009/042) with a clear go/caution/no-go recommendation
Domain + handle availability cross-checked for the recommended name
fail_if: No documented recommendation or risk rationale

subject: OAuth-only auth posture compliance review (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY fail-closed)

pass_if: All three enforcement layers (src/oauth/token.ts, Worker env-sanitizer, Sandbox env-sanitizer) confirmed to reject ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
Anthropic Commercial Terms / usage-policy obligations for OAuth-only operation documented
Gap list (if any) produced with remediation owners
fail_if: Any layer found to accept the key without a flagged remediation task

subject: ToS and Privacy Policy drafting for subagentknowledge.com

pass_if: Draft Terms of Service published covering acceptable use, liability limits, and termination
Draft Privacy Policy covering data collected, subprocessors (Anthropic, Cloudflare, etc.), and retention
Both reference OAuth-only auth and the no-API-key data-handling posture
fail_if: Either document missing or not tailored to subagentknowledge.com
